Citizen.title: Citizen
Citizen.description: Represents a citizen's public, on-ledger data within the Promethea Network State.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Citizen entity, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

decentralizedId.description: The citizen's Decentralized Identifier (DID) - their Promethean Passport anchor.

displayName.description: The citizen's chosen public display name.

reputationScore.description: A non-transferable score representing the citizen's proven history of positive contributions.

contributionScore.description: A score representing the citizen's overall contributions to the network (sweat equity + capital invested).

personhoodScore.description: A score calculated using Quadratic Voting principles to prevent domination by large token-holders.

skills.description: An array of verifiable skills possessed by the citizen (Verifiable Credentials).

proofOfUniqueness.description: A verifiable credential confirming the DID is linked to a single, unique intelligence (biological or artificial).

issuer.description: The Decentralized Identifier (DID) of the trusted Identity Oracle that issued the credential.

issuanceDate.description: The timestamp of when the uniqueness verification was performed.

isGovIdVerified.description: A flag indicating whether the citizen has successfully verified their real-world government-issued identity via a trusted oracle.

Proposal.title: Proposal
Proposal.description: Represents a governance proposal within the Promethean DAC. It now serves as a live dashboard for capital formation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Proposal entity.

proposerId.description: Reference to Citizen who proposed the proposal.

description.description: A detailed description of the proposal.

status.description: The current status of the proposal (e.g., 'Draft', 'Active', 'Passed', 'Rejected').

category.description: The category of the proposal (e.g., 'RWA Acquisition', 'Governance').

votingStartTime.description: The date and time when voting on the proposal starts.

votingEndTime.description: The date and time when voting on the proposal ends.

ipfsCid.description: The IPFS Content Identifier (CID) for the full proposal documentation.

targetEquity.description: The target amount of capital to be raised from citizen investors.

pledgedCapital.description: The current amount of capital pledged by citizens.

pledgedSweatEquity.description: The number of tasks that have been pledged by citizens.

tasks.description: A structured list of actionable tasks generated by the AI underwriter.

RealWorldAsset.title: RealWorldAsset
RealWorldAsset.description: Represents a Real-World Asset (RWA) within the Promethean Network State.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RealWorldAsset entity.

name.description: The name of the real-world asset (e.g., 'Apartment Complex A', 'Farmland B').

description.description: A detailed description of the real-world asset.

location.description: The geographical location of the real-world asset.

assetType.description: The type of asset (e.g., 'Real Estate', 'Agriculture', 'Small Business').

value.description: The estimated total value of the asset in USD.

tokenIds.description: References to UVT tokens representing fractional ownership of the asset. (Relationship: RealWorldAsset 1:N UniversalValueToken)

UniversalValueToken.title: UniversalValueToken
UniversalValueToken.description: Represents a Universal Value Token (UVT) within the Promethean Network State.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UniversalValueToken entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to Citizen who owns the token.

assetId.description: Reference to RealWorldAsset the token represents fractional ownership of.

amount.description: The amount of the token held.

Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: Represents a vote cast by a citizen on a proposal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Vote entity.

citizenId.description: Reference to Citizen who cast the vote.

proposalId.description: Reference to Proposal being voted on.

votePower.description: The voting power used by the citizen in this vote.

support.description: Indicates whether the citizen supported the proposal (true) or opposed it (false).

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task related to a proposal or real-world asset management. Now includes compensation choice.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

proposalId.description: Reference to the Proposal the task is associated with. Required for pre-acquisition tasks.

assetId.description: Reference to RealWorldAsset the task is associated with. Can be optional until acquisition.

assigneeId.description: Reference to Citizen assigned to the task via a Pledge. Optional until a citizen applies.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

status.description: The current status of the task (e.g., 'Open', 'In Progress', 'Completed').

dueDate.description: The due date for the task.

compensationChoice.description: The compensation model chosen by the citizen who pledged for this task. This may be pre-set by the proposal.

Pledge.title: Pledge
Pledge.description: Represents a citizen's commitment to a proposal, either through capital or sweat equity.

citizenId.description: The DID of the citizen making the pledge.

proposalId.description: The ID of the proposal being pledged to.

type.description: The type of pledge being made.

amount.description: For 'Capital' pledges, the amount of currency committed.

taskId.description: For 'SweatEquity' pledges, the ID of the task being committed to.

compensationChoice.description: The compensation model chosen by the citizen for their sweat equity.

GapLoan.title: GapLoan
GapLoan.description: Represents a short-term, peer-to-peer loan for a specific project need.

proposalId.description: The proposal this loan is associated with.

title.description: A short, descriptive title for the loan need.

description.description: A detailed explanation of what the funds will be used for.

amountNeeded.description: The total amount of capital required.

amountFunded.description: The amount of capital funded so far.

status.description: The current status of the loan.

proposerId.description: The citizen ID of the user who proposed the loan.

funderId.description: The citizen ID of the user who funded the loan.

DACParams.title: DACParams
DACParams.description: Represents parameters within the Promethean DAC.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DACParam entity.

name.description: Name of the parameter (e.g., initialReputation, governanceThreshold).

value.description: Value of the parameter (can be string, number, boolean, etc.).

Constitution.title: Constitution
Constitution.description: Represents the living constitution of the Promethean Network State.

id.description: Unique identifier for the constitution document (e.g., 'canon').

version.description: The semantic version of the constitution (e.g., '1.0.0', '1.1.0').

content.description: The full text content of the constitution in Markdown format.

lastAmended.description: The timestamp of the last amendment.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Stores tasks related to real-world asset management.

/constitutions/{constitutionId}.description: Stores versions of the living constitution.
